title: render
description: Entry point for CReact applications. Renders the component tree, reconciles state, runs handlers.
signature: render(fn: () => any, memory: Memory, stackName: string, options?: RenderOptions): RenderResult
param_fn_desc: Function that returns the root component tree.
param_stack_name_desc: Required. Identifier for the state store.
returns_desc: A <0>RenderResult</0> object. Its <1>ready</1> property is a <2>Promise<void></2> that resolves when the initial deployment completes.
usage_awaiting: The value <0>render</0> returns is synchronous, but the work it starts is not. The tenant-fleet entry awaits <1>ready</1> for the first deployment, then <2>settled</2> for every cascade it triggers, so a one-shot run persists everything before the process exits.
in_the_wild: Watch a single call boot a durable app in the <0>durable-counter walkthrough</0>.
